data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for actor identity linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Actor identity linkage when available'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the existence of actor identity linkage. The linked use case mentions the need for this linkage but does not provide evidence that it is being implemented or maintained as required, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of actor identity linkage when available.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
